phase_templates.title: Intake
default_acceptance_checks: The request scope is explicit and evidence-backed.

phase_templates.title: Policy Review
default_acceptance_checks: The governing policy and escalation tier are explicit.

phase_templates.title: Release Gate
default_acceptance_checks: The final packet includes the required evidence chain.

blocking_conditions: Any high-tier change without a human gate.
Any packet with missing evidence references.
